features: 【6 in 1 Cube Socket】 The multi plug extension is equipped with 4 AC outlets and 2 USB Ports, sufficient spacing on each side allows you to make full use of them without any blockage, providing power for up to 6 devices at the same time.

【Cube Extension Lead with Usb】The charging cube with 2 USB ports (1 USB A+1 USB C) delivers a total output of 5V/3.4A, fast charging speed up to 5V/2.4A per port. You can easily charge your headphones, tablets, phones and other usb-charged devices.

【Compact & Portable Design】With a size of 7.6*7.6*7.6cm and 1.5M cable, the compact power cube extension is easy to carry, just put into a backpack or briefcase, ideal for home, office, dorm or travel.

【Multiple Safety Protection】13A fused UK plug, flame retardant material adopted, children shuttered sockets design, the power cube 1.5M has built-in multiple protection to avoid overload, over-current, over-voltage, short-circuit during use, which brings you a safe charging experience.

【Mountable Extension Lead】Our extension cube comes with a bracket that can be fixed on a wall or hidden underneath the office desk for space-saving, which offers a great solution for making the desktop tidy and well-organized!
description: Our uniquely designed cube-shape power extension comes with 2 USB ports and 4 sockets. With the included docking, the Power Cube can be mounted anywhere: on your desk or a wall, in home or office, and any other places you want. Perfect for traveling, compact in the bag and creates enough electrical outlets for laptop, mobile phone, camera and so on. Now you do not need to worry about running out of battery, as power is available right at your bedside.
